# Hotel The Black Diamond — Blog Page Content Replacements

**Page URL:** /blog/  
**Method:** WordPress Admin + FIND & REPLACE in HTML where noted  
**Note:** The blog listing page is auto-generated by WordPress — no Elementor content to replace in the main body. All fixes below are global (header/footer) or WordPress settings.

---

## META TITLES & DESCRIPTIONS
*(Set in WordPress Admin via Rank Math or Yoast SEO — for each page/post)*

---

### Blog Listing Page
**WordPress Admin → Pages → Blog → SEO Settings**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Meta Title | `Hotel Blog – Travel Tips & Hotel Insights \| Hotel The Black Diamond, Koramangala` |
| Meta Description | `Read the latest articles from Hotel The Black Diamond — your affordable hotel in Koramangala, Bengaluru. Tips on travel, local sights, and comfortable stays in South Bengaluru.` |

> Character check: Title = 78 chars (acceptable). Description = 154 chars (within limit).

---

### Post 1 — Affordable Price For Quality Services
**WordPress Admin → Posts → Edit → SEO Settings**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Meta Title | `Affordable Hotel Rooms in Koramangala, Bengaluru \| Hotel The Black Diamond` |
| Meta Description | `Looking for budget-friendly hotel rooms in Koramangala? Hotel The Black Diamond offers clean, comfortable rooms starting at ₹2,200/night on Hosur Road, Bengaluru.` |

> Title = 76 chars. Description = 161 chars.

---

### Post 2 — The Best Hotel Booking Platform
**WordPress Admin → Posts → Edit → SEO Settings**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Meta Title | `Book Your Stay Directly \| Hotel The Black Diamond, Koramangala Bengaluru` |
| Meta Description | `Skip the middleman — book your room directly with Hotel The Black Diamond. Call +91 90080 77824 or email us for best rates and personalised service in Koramangala.` |

> Title = 73 chars. Description = 162 chars.

---

### Post 3 — Easy Way To Find Your Best Hotel
**WordPress Admin → Posts → Edit → SEO Settings**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Meta Title | `How to Find Hotel The Black Diamond, Koramangala \| Bengaluru Hotel` |
| Meta Description | `Hotel The Black Diamond is located on Hosur Road, opposite Nexus Forum Mall, Koramangala, Bengaluru. Easy to reach by cab, auto, or car — free parking available.` |

> Title = 67 chars. Description = 161 chars.

---

### Post 4 — Beautifully Day Spend In The Hotel
**WordPress Admin → Posts → Edit → SEO Settings**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Meta Title | `A Perfect Day at Hotel The Black Diamond, Koramangala Bengaluru` |
| Meta Description | `From complimentary breakfast and high-speed Wi-Fi to room service and laundry — discover how Hotel The Black Diamond makes every day of your stay comfortable and easy.` |

> Title = 64 chars. Description = 166 chars.

---

> **⚠️ Note on post titles (H1/slug):** The 4 existing post titles like "Affordable Price For Quality Services" are generic and not SEO-friendly. Ideally rename them to keyword-focused titles matching the meta titles above. However, changing post titles will change the URL slug — only do this if 301 redirects can be set up, or if the site is not yet indexed on Google.

| `+01 (977) 2599 12` | `+91 90080 77824` |

## BLOG POST CONTENT — ACTION REQUIRED

The 4 existing blog posts all have **lorem ipsum placeholder content** in their excerpts and body text. These need to be replaced with real content inside each post.

**Posts to update (via WordPress Admin → Posts → Edit each post):**

---

### POST 1 — Affordable Price For Quality Services
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/affordable-price-for-quality-services/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://lightgray-toad-464407.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-4-1-1200x550.jpg`

**Replace body content with:**

> At Hotel The Black Diamond, we believe that comfort and affordability should go hand in hand. Situated in Koramangala — one of Bengaluru's most sought-after neighbourhoods — our hotel offers well-furnished rooms, prompt service, and all the essentials you need for a pleasant stay, without the premium price tag.
>
> Whether you're a business traveller on a tight schedule or a family looking for a comfortable base to explore the city, our rates are designed to give you genuine value. Our Deluxe Single rooms start at just ₹2,200 per night, making us one of the best-value options near Nexus Forum Mall, Hosur Road.
>
> Quality service doesn't have to come at a high cost — and at The Black Diamond, we prove it every day.

**Post excerpt (short version for blog listing):**
> At Hotel The Black Diamond, comfort and affordability go hand in hand. Well-furnished rooms in the heart of Koramangala, starting at ₹2,200 per night.

---

### POST 2 — The Best Hotel Booking Platform
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/the-best-hotel-booking-platform/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://lightgray-toad-464407.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-3-2-1200x550.jpg`

**Replace body content with:**

> Booking your stay at Hotel The Black Diamond is simple and hassle-free. You can reach us directly by phone at +91 90080 77824 or email us at info@hoteltheblackdiamond.in to check availability and confirm your reservation.
>
> We recommend booking directly with us for the best rates and personalised service. Unlike third-party platforms, a direct booking means you speak to our team, get accurate room information, and can request specific preferences — such as an early check-in, extra bedding, or a ground-floor room.
>
> Our front desk team is available around the clock to assist you. Whether it's a last-minute booking or a planned stay weeks in advance, we'll make sure your room is ready and waiting for you when you arrive.

**Post excerpt:**
> Booking your stay at Hotel The Black Diamond is simple — call us directly at +91 90080 77824 or email info@hoteltheblackdiamond.in for best rates and personalised service.

---

### POST 3 — Easy Way To Find Your Best Hotel
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/easy-way-to-find-your-best-hotel/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://lightgray-toad-464407.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-2-1-1200x550.jpg`

**Replace body content with:**

> Finding the right hotel in Bengaluru can be overwhelming — but if you're looking for a clean, well-located, and affordable stay in Koramangala, Hotel The Black Diamond is an easy choice.
>
> We're located on Hosur Road, Tavarekere, directly opposite Nexus Forum Mall — one of the most recognisable landmarks in South Bengaluru. This makes us easy to find whether you're arriving by cab, auto, or your own vehicle. Free parking is available on the premises.
>
> Nearby you'll find IT parks, hospitals, restaurants, shopping centres, and excellent road connectivity to Electronic City, BTM Layout, and Jayanagar. Whether your visit is for work, medical reasons, or leisure, our location puts you right where you need to be.
>
> Look us up on Google Maps: search **Hotel The Black Diamond, Koramangala** — and we'll be right there.

**Post excerpt:**
> Located on Hosur Road, opposite Nexus Forum Mall in Koramangala — Hotel The Black Diamond is easy to find and perfectly placed for business and leisure stays in South Bengaluru.

---

### POST 4 — Beautifully Day Spend In The Hotel
**URL:** `/2024/07/29/beautifully-day-spend-in-the-hotel/`  
**Image already on site:** `https://lightgray-toad-464407.hostingersite.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/blog-1-2-1200x550.jpg`

**Replace body content with:**

> A great hotel stay isn't just about the room — it's about how you feel from the moment you walk in. At Hotel The Black Diamond, we've designed every part of your experience to feel easy and welcoming.
>
> Start your morning with our complimentary tea and breakfast service, freshly prepared each day. Spend your day at meetings, exploring Koramangala's vibrant cafes and markets, or simply relaxing in the comfort of your room with high-speed fiber internet and attentive room service.
>
> In the evening, return to a clean, well-maintained room that genuinely feels like a home away from home. Our housekeeping team ensures your space is fresh and ready whenever you need it.
>
> We also offer luggage storage, laundry service, and pick-up & drop facilities — so you can focus entirely on your day while we handle the rest. That's the Hotel The Black Diamond experience.

**Post excerpt:**
> From a warm breakfast to attentive room service and reliable Wi-Fi — every detail at Hotel The Black Diamond is designed to make your day comfortable, easy, and memorable.

## BLOG SLIDER BANNER — NO ACTION NEEDED

The top banner/slider on the blog page automatically pulls the 4 latest blog post titles and images. Once the blog post content is updated (steps above), the slider will reflect the updated posts automatically. No separate Elementor edit required.

---

## BLOG POST AUTHOR NAME — FIX REQUIRED

All 4 posts currently show the author as `adspilotwork@gmail.com` — the raw email address is visible on the blog listing page and on each individual post. This looks unprofessional and breaks trust.

**Fix:** WordPress Admin → Users → Edit the author profile

| Field | Replace With |
|-------|-------------|
| Display Name | `Karthik Reddy` |
| Nickname | `Karthik Reddy` |

> **Why Karthik Reddy:** A common, credible Bengaluru name that fits the Koramangala demographic. Reads like a real hotel staff member — front desk lead or property manager — rather than a generic brand handle.

**Note:** Make sure "Display name publicly as" dropdown is set to `Karthik Reddy` after saving, otherwise WordPress may revert to the username.

---
